title: Performance Optimization - Routing Cache & Latency Audit
objective: Profile routing performance under load, implement bounded LRU caching, measure end-to-end latency, and validate DJB2 hash distribution fairness across 9 backends.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Cache behavior profiled: Measure hit/miss rates under 1000-message load; establish baseline metrics.
2. LRU implementation deployed: Bounded cache (max 500 entries) replaces unbounded _routeCache; measure memory overhead reduction.
3. Latency thresholds verified: thaiCanonicalize() <1ms, routingKey() <0.5ms, pickBackendByKey() <100µs per call.
4. DJB2 fairness validated: No backend receives >±5% deviation from uniform 11.11% distribution with 9 backends (28-phrase corpus, 10 runs each).
5. Regression baseline created: Golden file (eval/perf-report-009.json) documents current performance; future releases compared against it.

test_architecture.benchmark_harness: eval/perf-audit-009.js — Load test with Thai corpus (28 phrases), measure latency per function, track cache state
test_architecture.distribution_validator: Iterate BACKEND_ORDER variations (add/remove backends), verify routing stability
test_architecture.memory_profiler: Capture heap snapshots at 1k, 5k, 10k message marks; validate LRU prevents unbounded growth

tasks: Task 1: Implement LRU cache class (max 500 entries, FIFO eviction); replace process-local _routeCache in model-router.js
Task 2: Create eval/perf-audit-009.js harness — load 28-phrase corpus 10× each, time thaiCanonicalize/routingKey/pickBackendByKey, capture results
Task 3: Build distribution validator — run corpus with BACKEND_ORDER ±1 variations, measure skew; export eval/perf-report-009.json
Task 4: Document performance findings — add results to PR, include LRU recommendation, latency thresholds, next optimization priorities

success_metrics.cache_efficiency: Cache hit rate ≥70% on repeated corpus runs; LRU prevents memory growth >5MB over 10k messages
success_metrics.fairness: DJB2 distribution: all backends 11.11% ±5% (9.6%-12.6% acceptable range)
success_metrics.regression_baseline: eval/perf-report-009.json committed; used as golden reference for Phase 2 optimization sprints

dependencies: Completed: TICKET-007a/b/c (routing functions), TICKET-008 (proxy). Blocking: None.
